Warning indicator 5 ('single/multiple claim indicator' derived when the stay record is created by 
checking the number of final action claims that comprise the stay): 

0 = Stay includes a single final action claim 
1 = Stay includes multiple final action claims 
2 = Stay includes multiple final action claims and beneficiary is still a patient (applicable to SNF stays
